scope.dependency_radius: .ai entry and index docs; human-facing guide links may be added under .dev/guides if needed.
constraints: Agent-facing canonical instructions should be English.
Preserve path names, routing rules, and source-of-truth relationships exactly unless another remediation task changes them.
non_goals: Do not change sub-agent manifest fields in this task unless required by wording consistency.

review_findings: .ai entry docs are heavily Traditional Chinese mixed with English despite .ai/** defaulting to English.

steps: Rewrite canonical .ai entry docs to concise English.
Move or link zh-TW tutorial explanations to human-facing guides only when needed.
Run path reference checks after rewrite.
Run a targeted scan for remaining zh-TW-heavy paragraphs in selected .ai files.

results.summary: Rewrote selected agent-facing .ai entry docs to English and separated README purpose from INDEX catalogs.
tests_run: active-surface referenced-path existence scan excluding archival workflow records and retired requirements
rg -n -uu "[一-龥]" over remediated .ai entry docs
targeted stale entry reference scans for removed .dev index paths
targeted README catalog scans for remediated high-level README files
